sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106927" key="u(panw/malos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπανώμᾰλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n106927.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rather uneven,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">γάλα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:88" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.88</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
